7 deaths reported | 12 critically ill patients | 142 patients in isolation (16 confirmed AC + 101 suspected + 1 confirmed NC). Movement: Bunia General Referral Hospital (23), Rwampara General Referral Hospital (19), CME (19), Mongbwalu General Referral Hospital (22), Nyankunde General Referral Hospital (44), Bambu General Referral Hospital (10), Aru General Referral Hospital (5).

37 psychosocial assessments, 20 positive. Follow-up of 6 people living with the disease in isolation. Support to 2 families of deceased. Support to 21 healthcare staff. Sensitization: 15 religious leaders, 57 students, 33 teachers, 205 taxi-motorcyclists.
